name: Venom
description:
Test Subjects

TW // KIDNAPPING, EXPERIMENTATION

Venom found himself kidnapped by the Life Foundation, unable to break out of his cell and left with a human cellmate who was here for some unknown purpose. After a week, the scientists overseeing them begin a cruel test...
